welcome:
Welcome to TurkTextileHub 🌟
B2B platform for Turkish textile trade
supplier_registration_start:
Great! We'll start your registration as a supplier.
This will only take two minutes.
prompt_company_name: What is the name of your company or store?
prompt_contact_name: What is the name of the contact person?
prompt_phone:
What is your phone number (with country code)?
Example: +905551234567
registration_success:
✅ You have been successfully registered as a supplier!
We will contact you soon.
cancel: Operation cancelled. Type /start to begin again.
error_general: An error occurred. Please try again or type /start.
